processing.text: declare @message nvarchar(4000), @q nvarchar(4000), @fields nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(4000), @irregular nvarchar(4000), @field varchar(32), @irregularChars varchar(128), @r int select @irregularChars = '''`~!@#$%^&*(),;"<>?/\,_' select @duplicate = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell đã có.' else 'The value of cell %invalidCell is invalid or already exists.' end select @irregular = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell có chứa các ký tự: ' + @irregularChars else 'The value of cell %invalidCell contains any of the following characters: ' + @irregularChars end select @fields = 'ma_kh, ten_kh, ten_kh2, dia_chi, ma_so_thue, doi_tac, ma_nvbh, tk, ma_tt, t_tien_cn, kh_yn, cc_yn, nv_yn, nh_kh1, nh_kh2, nh_kh3, dien_thoai, fax, e_mail, home_page, tk_nh, ngan_hang, tinh_thanh' -- Check alter table @@table alter column ma_kh char(32) create index i on @@table (ma_kh) if @type = '0' delete @@table where ma_kh in (select ma_kh from dmkh) select @field = 'ma_kh', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_kh like '%[' + @irregularChars + ']%'&Irregular; select @field = 'tk', @r = min(stt) from @@table where tk <> '' and tk not in (select tk from dmtk where loai_tk = 1)&Error; select @field = 'ma_tt', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_tt <> '' and ma_tt not in (select ma_tt from dmtt)&Error; select @field = 'ma_nvbh', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_nvbh <> '' and ma_nvbh not in (select ma_nvbh from dmnvbh)&Error; select @field = 'nh_kh1', @r = min(stt) from @@table where nh_kh1 <> '' and nh_kh1 not in (select ma_nh from dmnhkh where loai_nh = 1)&Error; select @field = 'nh_kh2', @r = min(stt) from @@table where nh_kh2 <> '' and nh_kh2 not in (select ma_nh from dmnhkh where loai_nh = 2)&Error; select @field = 'nh_kh3', @r = min(stt) from @@table where nh_kh3 <> '' and nh_kh3 not in (select ma_nh from dmnhkh where loai_nh = 3)&Error; select a.* into #k from @@table a join dmkh b on a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh delete @@table where ma_kh in (select ma_kh from #k) -- select @field = 'ma_kh' select @q = 'select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.ma_kh <> b.ma_kh and a.ma_kh = rtrim(b.ma_kh) ' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, dmkh b with (index(PK_dmkh)) where a.ma_kh = rtrim(b.ma_kh)&Duplicate; select @q = 'select top 1 @r = b.stt from dmkh a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.ma_kh= rtrim(b.ma_kh) ' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; -- Insert select @q = 'insert into dmkh(' + @fields + ', status, datetime0, datetime2, user_id0, user_id2, ong_ba, ghi_chu, t_tien_hd, ' select @q = @q + 'ma_td1, ma_td2, ma_td3, sl_td1, sl_td2, sl_td3, gc_td1, gc_td2, gc_td3, s1, s2, s3, s4, s5, s6)' select @q = @q + 'select ' + @fields + ', ''1'', getdate(), getdate(), rtrim(@@userID), rtrim(@@userID), '''', '''', 0, ' select @q = @q + ''''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0, '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', '''', 0, 0, 0 from @@table' exec sp_executesql @q if @type = '1' begin update dmkh set ten_kh = b.ten_kh, ten_kh2 = b.ten_kh2, dia_chi = b.dia_chi, ma_so_thue = b.ma_so_thue, doi_tac = b.doi_tac, ma_nvbh = b.ma_nvbh, tk = b.tk, ma_tt = b.ma_tt, t_tien_cn = b.t_tien_cn, kh_yn = b.kh_yn, cc_yn = b.cc_yn, nv_yn = b.nv_yn, nh_kh1 = b.nh_kh1, nh_kh2 = b.nh_kh2, nh_kh3 = b.nh_kh3, dien_thoai = b.dien_thoai, fax = b.fax, e_mail = b.e_mail, home_page = b.home_page, tk_nh = b.tk_nh, ngan_hang = b.ngan_hang, tinh_thanh = b.tinh_thanh, datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID from dmkh a, #k b where a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh end
